features.name: authentication
features.description: Email+password login, 2FA via email OTP, JWT session

features.name: create_order
features.description: Public form + manual creation, active orders table, internal notes

features.name: order_status
features.description: Status transitions, audit history, cancellation with stock reversal

features.name: generate_budget
features.description: Automatic price calculation (filament+electricity+amortization+margin), PDF, email delivery

features.name: region_parameters
features.description: Editable configuration of $/kg, kWh, watts, lifespan, margins per region

features.name: stock_management
features.description: CRUD for filaments and supplies, automatic deduction, movement log, low-stock alerts

features.name: arquiminis
features.description: Fixed product with price matrix (style/scale/pack), dynamic form, manual discounts

features.name: email_notifications
features.description: 7 automatic email triggers to client on status changes

features.name: printer_profiles
features.description: Printer CRUD, consumption parameters, per-axle maintenance with alerts

features.name: dashboard
features.description: Summary widgets, revenue and material usage charts

features.name: reports
features.description: Sales and stock reports, CSV export
